$comment: Canonical roadmap + backlog instance — the structure documentation/roadmap.md must produce (referenced by schemas/project.schema.json). Phase 1 is always the walking skeleton; enablers are explicit typed items; no calendar dates, relative units only.

phases.name: Walking Skeleton
phases.objective: Prove the architecture end to end with one buyer journey, deployed to staging.
phases.milestone: A buyer can browse one seeded product and place an order that persists — demonstrable in staging.

phases.name: Seller Onboarding
phases.milestone: A seller signs up, publishes a product, and sees it live in the catalog.

phases.name: Hardening & Should-haves
phases.objective: Close the should-priority backlog and the deferred NFRs.
phases.milestone: Performance budget met on the two core journeys; promo codes live.

risks.statement: ASM-002 (single warehouse per seller) drives the Phase 2 inventory model; if reversed, PH-02 stories US-014/US-015 need rework.
risks.mitigation: Confirm ASM-002 with the user before PH-02 starts.
